payload.title: Wrapper: multi-module support
payload.description: rustricted-rustc currently only lowers the single .rs file rustc is invoked with. Child modules loaded via 'mod foo;' read from the original on-disk path and skip lowering, so any multi-file strict crate fails on extension syntax. Walk the crate's src tree, lower every strict-marked file to a parallel temp directory, point rustc at the temp root. This is the gate to dogfooding any real internal crate.
